description: Draft of a ketubba. Location: Cairo. Dated: Wednesday, 13 Sivan 1400 Seleucid = 1089 CE. Groom: ʿOvadya b. Yefet ha-Levi. Bride: Sitt al-ʿAshīr bt. Netanʾel. Marriage payment: 40+80. Sitt al-ʿAshīr's dowry list is mostly preserved in the join ENA 3652.8 + ENA 2747.1 + ENA 2747.2 (PGPID 6743). (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
